author: YusufPatel81056
body:
15/23 📋 Every school must have an RSE policy, but is it clear, transparent, and respectful of your rights?

Use this RSE policy checklist to:
✅ Confirm withdrawal rights
✅ Check what’s taught and when
✅ Ensure access to teaching materials
#RSE #ParentsRights #FaithInSchools https://t.co/VFl3TYPIdt

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
14/23📘 What exactly must be taught in secondary RSE — and what should parents be asking?

Use our toolkit to:
✅ Understand statutory content
✅ See where Islamic values differ
✅ Ask informed questions about curriculum, resources, and external influences
#RSE #ParentsRights https://t.co/L7oqQPYruI

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
13/23🛡️ PROTECT. 📚 GUIDE. 📢 ADVOCATE.
Every parent can take action on RSE — whether it’s withdrawing your child, asking the right questions, or pushing for policy change.
This toolkit helps you choose your path.
#ParentsRights #RSE #FaithInSchools #MuslimParents https://t.co/7TpSsuS3zU

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
12/23 📢 Parents: You have legal rights when it comes to RSE.
From withdrawing your child from sex education to being consulted and reviewing resources, your voice matters.
Know your rights. Use them.
#ParentsRights #RSE #FaithInSchools https://t.co/ykqB1LzlWB

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
11/23 📘 Not everything in RSE is set in stone.

Our toolkit outlines what schools can and cannot change, from delaying certain content to removing inappropriate resources.

💬 If you don’t know what’s flexible, you can’t challenge it effectively.

#RSE #ParentsRights https://t.co/kwlCIl6q5H

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
10/23📘 The toolkit breaks down exactly what children must be taught in secondary RSE, and what isn’t required.

Use this section to ask clear, informed questions when your school goes beyond the statutory guidance.

#RSE #ParentsRights #FaithInSchools #ProtectingInnocence https://t.co/izO5elevSm

author: YusufPatel81056
body:

#RSE #ParentsRights #FaithInSchools #ProtectingInnocence https://t.co/RUVXX6JKvx

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
8/23 📚 Teachers must teach objectively, not promote personal views on relationships or 'gender'.

The law requires RSE to reflect a range of perspectives, including religious ones.

📌 Schools must be fair, balanced, and ideologically neutral.

#ParentsRights #RSE https://t.co/vnIm17TVqm

author: YusufPatel81056
body:
7/23 📚 Just because RSE is statutory doesn't mean schools have no flexibility.

Schools decide:
✅ How it's taught — choice of resources & approach
📅 When it's taught — which year group & timing
Parents can engage to shape both.
#RSE #ParentsRights #EducationMatters https://t.co/4Gi4QDLDIt
